positive: A stylized, minimalist representation of a mountain range silhouette at sunset. The mountains should have clean, sharp edges and a dramatic contrast against a vibrant gradient sky of deep indigo, warm orange, and magenta. Incorporate subtle geometric patterns (e.g., abstract triangles or chevrons) within the mountain peaks or across the sky, keeping the design highly repeatable and visually impactful. The composition must be centered and suitable for large-format apparel printing, ensuring all elements are scalable and clean. Style: modern flat design meets graphic novel linework, vector art aesthetic. Lighting: high contrast, backlit silhouette effect. Color palette: jewel tones and earth tones, limited to 3-4 primary colors.
negative: low resolution, blurry, noisy, text, logo, watermark, signature, realistic photo, grainy, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, faded, oversaturated, bright flash, busy background
